questions.question: Describe the fundamental model of image degradation/restoration process. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the key components of the model

questions.question: State the purpose of Wiener filter in image restoration. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Emphasize its role in reducing noise

questions.question: What is the difference between a low-pass filter and a high-pass filter in the context of image restoration? (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on the effects of each filter on the image
